claims.claim: Three Agreement Profile actions compile under the CKB target profile.
Agreement Profile is separate from NovaSeal core.
Receipts are materialized as outputs by implemented actions.
claims.evidence: resolved transaction harness and live devnet lifecycle runner materialize receipt outputs; primitive-strict generated ProofPlan is clean

claims.claim: Terminal AgreementCell resource transitions are strict-mode sound.
claims.evidence: non-strict check, primitive-strict 0.16, resolved transaction harness, and live devnet lifecycle pass

python3 scripts/nova_agreement_tx_shape_harness.py --pretty matched 12/12 shape and arithmetic-boundary expectations; cargo run --manifest-path harness/ckb_vm/Cargo.toml --bin novaseal_agreement_tx_harness -- --pretty matched 20/20 script-layer and node-verifier expectations; scripts/novaseal_agreement_devnet_stateful_live.py passed originate -> repay, originate -> claim, and live negative dry-runs

claims.claim: Native CKB funding/settlement shapes are locally verified.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-tx-shape-report.json covers occupied-capacity floors, principal payout, repayment, collateral return, default claim, time reject, party reject, under-capacity reject, and wrong-settlement reject

claims.claim: Compiled Agreement Profile actions execute in CKB VM for positive and negative terminal-path cases.
claims.evidence: the older per-action CKB VM harness is superseded by the signed-intent lifecycle type-script runner and resolved transaction harness

claims.claim: Resolved Agreement Profile transactions execute through ckb-script and ckb-verification.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-ckb-tx-report.json covers deterministic resolved transactions with action code CellDeps, a local harness lock CellDep, lock/type script groups, non-contextual checks, contextual checks, matched expectations, and zero not-executed fixture files

claims.claim: Native CKB transaction validity and occupied-capacity rejection are verified by resolved transaction execution.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-ckb-tx-report.json verifies accepted originate/repay/claim transactions and rejects under_capacity_reject at the node contextual verifier layer

claims.claim: Payout output settlement amounts are enforced by Agreement Profile scripts.
claims.evidence: wrong_settlement_amount_reject mutates the typed NativeCkbPayoutV0 lender repayment output and is rejected by the resolved transaction harness; the live devnet runner also dry-runs a wrong payout amount rejection

claims.claim: Agreement terminal intents have fixed-width wallet signing vectors.

claims.evidence: borrower/lender signature pubkeys are checked against Agreement authority fields; payout lock args are checked through typed NativeCkbPayoutV0 recipient evidence and live negative dry-runs

source guards cover principal+fixed_fee, nonce+1, and payout capacity additions; arithmetic boundary fixtures repay_principal_max_fee_1_overflow_reject, repay_principal_max_fee_0_accept, nonce_max_increment_reject, and nonce_max_minus_1_increment_accept pass the local shape harness
